subtitle: A horseshoe bay of white pebbles and deep turquoise water under limestone cliffs on Kefalonia's Paliki peninsula — 'Myrtos without the crowds' — on a Greek island almost entirely rebuilt after the 1953 earthquake that flattened it.
spike_statement: A horseshoe of white pebbles and turquoise under limestone cliffs on Kefalonia — 'Myrtos without the crowds' — on an island flattened and rebuilt after the 1953 earthquake.

levers.photo_tone: deep turquoise Ionian water in a horseshoe bay of bright white pebbles, pale limestone cliffs and green brush rising steeply behind, the low west sun on the sea, two small tavernas on the terrace above
